name: AllowSubstitution
title: Allow Substitution Codes (2.9.1 - 1.1.0)
description: Code system of concepts used to indicate whether the appointment resource may be substituted for another by the entity assigned to fulfill the appointment.  Used in HL7 Version 2.x messaging in the AIS and AIG segments.

property.description: version when was this code introduced
version when was this code deprecated
A code that indicates the status of the concept. Typical values are active, experimental, deprecated, and retired
A string that provides additional detail pertinent to the use or understanding of the concept

concept.display: Contact the Placer Contact Person prior to making any substitutions of this resource
concept.definition: Contact the Placer Contact Person prior to making any substitutions of this resource

concept.display: Substitution of this resource is not allowed
concept.definition: Substitution of this resource is not allowed

concept.display: Notify the Placer Contact Person, through normal institutional procedures, that a substitution of this resource has been made
concept.definition: Notify the Placer Contact Person, through normal institutional procedures, that a substitution of this resource has been made

concept.display: Substitution of this resource is allowed
concept.definition: Substitution of this resource is allowed
